superseded_note: Human gate owner reshaped capability 5 on 2026-07-22: valuation & analysis replaces paper trading simulation. This draft is retained for audit history only and is not runnable. Active contract: docs/tqe-p6-valuation-analysis-contract.md; active draft: workflow/tqe-p6-valuation-analysis.work-unit.draft.json.
goal: Implement the simulation-only paper trading slice per the approved P6 contract: deterministic hypothetical fills (next-trading-day-open rule) over admitted EOD data for a single security with explicit simple rules, parameterized TW fee/tax/slippage cost model, session-local persistence, and research-only hypothetical performance presentation. No broker connector, no credentials, no order artifact of any kind.
implementation_slices: simulation spec schema validation (tqe-paper-trading-sim/v1) with fail-closed rejection
local-engine deterministic fill model: next_trading_day_open on raw OHLCV with PIT (available_at <= as_of) visibility
parameterized TW cost model (brokerage fee, fee discount, sell-side transaction tax, slippage bps)
hypothetical trade and performance record computation with explicit cost-model echo
session-local persistence of specs and results (flat versioned JSON, watchlist/alerts style)
research-only in-app presentation (hypothetical performance notes, no order-like affordance, no solicitation language)
deterministic fixture tests asserting fills, cost arithmetic, PIT behaviour, and absence of any order/credential code path
acceptance evidence JSON recording simulation_only scope
activation_requirements: human approval of this exact work-unit digest
p4_research_closure.py passing before and after implementation
offline replay of deterministic fixture tests
acceptance JSON with mode recorded as simulation_only and broker connector recorded as unapproved
cannot_claim: order route, order command, or order UI control
intraday, delayed, or realtime data used
simulated results presented as solicitation or performance promise
specs or results leaving the local machine
